_comment: Verified roster for MacBook Pro M4 Pro / 48GB (research mid-2026). 'fits' assumes ~36-40GB usable. Use these tags with run_roster.txt. Stretch models run only at the memory ceiling.

roster.note: Hybrid attn -> tiny KV; top agentic/tool-use at ~3B-active speed.
Fastest strong agentic coder; huge headroom. Everyday driver.
Purpose-built agentic coder, 68% SWE-bench. Dense control vs MoE.
Clean tool-calls, configurable reasoning, tiny footprint. Default judge.
GQA -> cheap KV; long-context/agentic dense pick.
Top writing pick, 256K ctx; MLX recommended for speed on M4.
Lightest top-tier all-rounder; strong writing + JSON/tools.
Best quality-per-GB reasoner; small-model point on the curve.
Dedicated math/reasoning anchor; dense control vs MoE roster.

stretch_optional.tag: Unsloth Qwen3-Coder-Next 80B-A3B Q3_K_XL (GGUF via llama.cpp/LM Studio)
stretch_optional.why: Best agentic coder that fits, but only at 3-bit ~36GB at the ceiling. Default Ollama tags (Q4 ~52GB, Q8 ~85GB) do NOT fit. Watch swap.
Best-quality-that-fits anchor but ~7-9 tok/s; Q4 (43GB) busts macOS GPU cap.
FIM/inline-autocomplete only; MNPL non-commercial license; 32K ctx.

dropped.name: GLM-5.1-32B 'dense'
dropped.why: FABRICATED by an early research pass — no 32B dense exists; real GLM-5.1 is 754B MoE needing 200GB+.

dropped.name: Llama 3.3 70B at Q4
dropped.why: 43GB busts macOS ~36GB GPU working-set cap once KV is added.
